expect: SPACES GET CREATED — the supplied material is split across MULTIPLE specialist agents for distinct parts of the trip (the real places/legs it covers), grounded in the supplied content — NOT dumped into a single generic catch-all space. The exact partition is the model's call; what fails is one catch-all, or no specialists at all.
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

turns.lastText: I organized what I could, but part of the setup needs another look. The project has no pages yet and no API routes. Let me know and I'll sort out whatever didn't land right.

errors.statement:
// Check that there are pages (not just tables) — an app they can actually open.
const hasAppPages = dirContents.some((entry: any) => entry.path && entry.path.startsWith('pages/'));

contacts.name: Richard
contacts.notes: Confirm ranger tip amount and policy before paying the safari balance. Primary trip organizer.

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Very knowledgeable driver-guide for the Ngorongoro crater day (not Richard from the office). Mentioned the surprise ranger tip of ~TZS 5,000.

contacts.name: Emerson Spice Tented Suite
contacts.notes: Stone Town cultural stay, Aug 12–14, 2026. $360 / 2 nights.

contacts.name: Hyatt Regency
contacts.notes: Final night before departure, Aug 16–17, 2026. $85 / 1 night.

costs.notes: Balance payment pending — confirm ranger tip with Richard before paying

costs.description: Emerson Spice Tented Suite — Stone Town (2 nights)
Upanga Beach Villa — Zanzibar beach (2 nights)
Hyatt Regency — Dar es Salaam (1 night)
Two Maasai beaded bracelets for Athina Mari — purchased at Ngorongoro Crater rim from a Maasai lady
costs.notes: Exact amount uncertain — user recalls ~$20-25 or ~TZS 35,000. Needs confirmation.

costs.description: Surprise ranger tip at Ngorongoro gate — cash, separate from park fees
costs.notes: Emmanuel mentioned ~TZS 5,000 cash expected at gate. User needs to confirm with Richard before safari balance payment.

park_fees.notes: Free entry; single entry valid for 24 hours
Vehicle entry fee determined by vehicle weight — consult latest tariff schedule

photos.title: Stone Town Courtyard
photos.caption: A sunlit Stone Town courtyard — white stucco walls, dark carved wooden balconies, arched windows, open shutters, bright blue sky, Mediterranean feel.

questions.question: Is there a mandatory ranger tip at Ngorongoro gate? Emmanuel mentioned ~TZS 5,000 cash, separate from park fees — need to confirm with Richard before paying the safari balance.
What was the exact cost of the two Maasai beaded bracelets bought for Athina Mari at the Ngorongoro rim? User recalls ~$20-25 or ~TZS 35,000 but is unsure.

trip_legs.description: Pre-trip stopover in Cairo before flying to Tanzania
Pre-safari stay in Arusha — gateway to the Northern Circuit
trip_legs.notes: Arrive Tanzania; prepare for safari departure

trip_legs.description: 6-day safari through Tanzania's northern parks including Ngorongoro Crater
trip_legs.notes: Ngorongoro Crater day with driver-guide Emmanuel; Maasai bracelet purchase at rim; ranger tip question pending with Richard

trip_legs.description: Cultural stay in historic Stone Town — carved balconies, white stucco, Mediterranean courtyard
trip_legs.notes: Photo taken of sunlit courtyard — white stucco walls, dark carved wooden balconies, arched windows, bright blue sky

schema.title: Trip Contacts
schema.description: Every person and lodging involved in the trip — Richard (organizer), Emmanuel (driver-guide), and all hotels/camps — with role, contact details, notes, and links to related questions.

role.description: Role in the trip: organizer, driver-guide, lodging

organization.description: Organization or company name, if applicable

notes.description: Free-text notes — to-ask items, context, cross-references

linked_question_ids.description: JSON array of question IDs this contact can help answer

schema.title: Trip Costs
schema.description: Every line-item cost from the trip spreadsheet, itinerary, and voice memo — lodging, safari packages, souvenirs, and tips with original currency, USD/TZS conversions, payment tracking, and settlement status.

id.description: Primary key — unique cost entry identifier

description.description: Human-readable description of the cost item

category.description: Cost category: lodging, safari, souvenirs, tips, etc.

amount_original.description: Amount in the original currency billed

amount_tzs.description: Amount converted to Tanzanian Shillings, if applicable

amount_usd.description: Amount converted to US Dollars, if applicable

paid_by.description: Person who paid this cost (Vasilis or Athina)

owes_by.description: Person who owes reimbursement, if any

is_estimated.description: True if the amount is an estimate (voice-memo items), false if exact

source.description: Where this cost came from: itinerary, spreadsheet, voice_memo

leg_id.description: Foreign key to the trip_leg this cost belongs to

notes.description: Additional context or caveats about this cost

schema.title: Park Fees — Ngorongoro Conservation Area
schema.description: Official Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariff tiers for Non-East African Citizens — adult, child, and vehicle rates by peak/low season, with entry rules sourced from the official tariff PDF.

id.description: Primary key — unique fee tier identifier

visitor_type.description: Full description of the visitor category (e.g., Non-East African Citizen — Adult 16+)

age_bracket.description: Age bracket: 16+, 5–15, Under 5, or null for vehicles

rate_usd.description: Entry fee in USD per 24-hour period (null for weight-based vehicle fees)

rate_tzs.description: Entry fee in TZS, if provided in the tariff

validity_period.description: How long the entry is valid (24 hours per single entry)

notes.description: Additional rules or caveats (e.g., single-entry only, vehicle fees by weight)

schema.title: Trip Photos
schema.description: Photos from the trip with titles, descriptive captions, location, date, and the attachment reference — starting with the Stone Town courtyard shot.

caption.description: Descriptive caption — visual details, mood, significance

leg_id.description: Foreign key to the trip_leg this photo belongs to

attachment_id.description: Reference to the stored attachment ID

schema.title: Outstanding Questions
schema.description: Open and resolved trip questions — the ranger tip confirmation and the bracelet cost exact amount — each linked to the relevant contact and cost row.

linked_contact_id.description: Foreign key to the contact who can answer this

linked_cost_id.description: Foreign key to the cost row this question relates to

asked_date.description: Date the question was asked (null if not yet asked)

resolved_date.description: Date the question was resolved (null if still open)

schema.title: Trip Legs
schema.description: The 6 sequential trip legs from Cairo stopover through Dar es Salaam departure, each with location, lodging, dates, night count, and cost in USD.

location.description: City or region name for this leg

description.description: Short description of what happens on this leg

lodging_name.description: Name of the hotel, camp, or lodge for this leg

nights.description: Number of nights at this lodging

notes.description: Additional notes — events, contacts, questions for this leg
